landing.heroTitle: Your AI that reads the fine print.
landing.heroDesc: Upload any document. Bainder's AI extracts every deadline, obligation, and action item — and reminds you before anything is due.
landing.freeNote: Free for 10 documents · No credit card required
landing.featureExtractDesc: AI reads every clause so you don't have to. Upload a PDF or photo and get keywords, categories, and a plain-language summary instantly.
landing.featureTrackDesc: Every obligation — signatures, payments, renewals, deadlines — becomes a trackable action item with a due date, automatically.
landing.featureRemindDesc: Get an email reminder 5 days before any deadline. Nothing buried in a contract will ever slip through the cracks again.
landing.featureUploadDesc: Drag and drop PDFs or photos of documents. Bainder reads scanned pages, printed contracts, and handwritten notes alike.
landing.featureSearchDesc: Search by keyword or filter by category across your entire document library in milliseconds.
landing.featurePrivateDesc: Every document is stored privately. Only you can access your files — enforced at the database level, not just the UI.
landing.ctaDesc: Create a free account and upload your first document in minutes.

signup.checkEmailDesc: We sent a confirmation link to {email}. Click it to activate your account.

pricing.title: Simple pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

upload.title: Upload Documents
upload.subtitle: PDF or image files up to 20 MB · multiple files supported
upload.dragDrop: Drag & drop PDFs or images here
upload.fileTypes: PDF, JPG, PNG, WEBP, GIF · or click to browse
upload.uploadedSuccess: {count, plural, one {✓ # file uploaded successfully.} other {✓ # files uploaded successfully.}}
upload.uploadedFailed: {count, plural, one {✗ # file failed.} other {✗ # files failed.}}
upload.processingNote: Keywords and summaries will appear on the documents page shortly.

followUps.title: Follow-ups
followUps.subtitle: Action items and deadlines extracted from your documents
followUps.noFollowUpsHint: Upload and process documents to automatically extract action items.

billing.title: Billing
billing.subtitle: Manage your subscription and plan.
billing.updatePayment: Update payment method, view invoices, or cancel.

documents.processing: Processing… keywords and summary will appear shortly.
documents.processingError: Processing failed. The PDF may be scanned or encrypted.

documentList.noDocumentsHint: Upload your first PDF to get started.
documentList.searchPlaceholder: Search by filename, keyword, category or summary…

upgradeBanner.message: You've used {count} of 10 free documents. Upgrade to Pro for unlimited documents and email reminders.

deleteDocument.confirmDesc: {filename} will be permanently deleted along with its keywords and summary. This cannot be undone.

renameTitle.saveHint: Enter to save · Esc to cancel

cookieBanner.text: We use cookies to keep you signed in.

account.confirmDesc: This will permanently delete all your documents, metadata, follow-ups, and your account. This cannot be undone.
